text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
"Tonight, would you allow me the privilege of
escorting you? I shall lead the way, Empress."

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
...What's all this? Are you plotting something?
And where exactly are you planning to "escort"
me?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Naturally, our destination is the delectable world
of ramen! ♪

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I've already made arrangements and picked
out a shop that suits your palate, so don't worry!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Take it as a token of my immense gratitude
towards you. ...Will you accept it?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: What am I going to do with you...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
"Rejoice, for you are now my escort for tonight.
Return at 6 p.m.—tardiness will be punished
severely!"

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
However, you're on room-cleaning duty once we
get back.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
There's a mountain of presents in the room again
this year... and they're all from your family.
